name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working in Perron-NS

labels: ["bug"]
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Where does it happen?

- [ ] Glasses lens (clock / departure boards)
- [ ] Phone companion app (planner / favorites / history)
- [ ] Backend proxy (NS data / Cloudflare Worker)
- [ ] Other

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap / swipe '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or a photo of the lens to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- App version (from Even Hub): <!-- e.g. v0.1.4 -->
- SDK version: <!-- from app.json -->
- Glasses model: <!-- e.g. Even Realities G2 -->
- Phone OS: <!-- e.g. Android 14 / iOS 18 -->
- NS route involved (if relevant): <!-- e.g. Utrecht Centraal -> Amsterdam Centraal -->

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here (logs, disruptions on the route, etc.).
